nodes.name: 高加索山脉
nodes.summary: 高加索山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括高加索雪鸡、Green warbler、红腹红尾鸲等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 草地鹨
nodes.summary: 草地鹨（Meadow pipit，学名 Anthus pratensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于乌拉尔山脉、高加索山脉，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 乌拉尔山脉
nodes.summary: 乌拉尔山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括岩雷鸟、長尾林鴞、棕眉山岩鹨等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: pratensis | synonyms = Alauda pratensis }} The meadow pipit (Anthus pratensis) is a small passerine bird that breeds throughout much of the Palearctic, from south-eastern Greenland and Iceland east to just east of the Ural Mountains in Russia, and south to central France and Romania; an isolated population also occurs in the Caucasus Mountains

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: pratensis | synonyms = Alauda pratensis }} The meadow pipit (Anthus pratensis) is a small passerine bird that breeds throughout much of the Palearctic, from south-eastern Greenland and Iceland east to just east of the Ural Mountains in Russia, and south to central France and Romania; an isolated population also occurs in the Caucasus Mountains

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is primarily a species of open habitats, either uncultivated or low-intensity agriculture, such as grassland, moorland, and heathland, but also occurs in small numbers on arable land
